queries.question: Show newspapers and magazines that circulate 20,000 copies.
queries.sql:
SELECT Publications.name 
FROM PublicationsPeriodicals JOIN Publications ON PublicationsPeriodicals.publication_id = Publications.id
WHERE (PublicationsPeriodicals.periodical_type = "Newspaper" OR PublicationsPeriodicals.periodical_type = "Magazine") AND Publications.circulation_numbers = 20000
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?publicationsperiodicals a :PublicationsPeriodicals .
  ?publications a :Publications .
  ?publicationsperiodicals p:hasPublications ?publications .
  ?publications p:name ?name .
  ?publicationsperiodicals p:periodical_type ?periodical_type_w .
  ?publicationsperiodicals p:periodical_type ?periodical_type_w2 .
  ?publications p:circulation_numbers ?circulation_numbers_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?periodical_type_w) = "Newspaper" || STR(?periodical_type_w2) = "Magazine")) && (STR(?circulation_numbers_w) = "20000" || STR(?circulation_numbers_w) = "20000.0")))
}
